summary:
ISS-1541 (WIN-013 c4 H3 'trilemma horns stacked' structural critique, moderate, orphan-picked-up 2026-05-14, escalated to Opus deep-attack) is already-fixed by the EXP-301 kappa-cluster restructure (operator-commissioned via HNOTE-OPERATOR-WIN-013-014-VERDICT-REFRAME-001, integrated 2026-05-10T14:15:29Z closing ISS-1870). EXP-301 (a) retired the trilemma block from WIN-013 entirely (verbatim grep of current data/wins.json:WIN-013 for trilemma|horn|dilemma|three-way|two-pronged returns zero matches across all fields), and (b) introduced SEC-6.14 (data/sections.json:part6 anchor p6-614-kappa-cluster) with the 'two-horned forced choice' framing in

The vise

subsection — implementing the c4 H3 recommendation option (a) ('reframe as a two-pronged dilemma'). The two horns are enumerated: (i) κ applies generally → 1999/2009 SG nulls refute the prediction; (ii) κ has scope conditions exempting 1999/2009 → those same conditions destroy PRED-TIER-3's August 2026 derivation. C5 (2026-05-10T18:51Z, post-EXP-301) and c6 (2026-05-11T06:40Z) curmudgeon reviews flagged 7 and 1 hole respectively — all citation/precision, NONE re-flagging the trilemma/horn structural concern. The c4 H3 recommendation was originally marked 'Defer to a future tightening pass — not blocking,' which the restructure has now answered substantively. ISS-1541 is structurally a stale leftover of the c4-era architecture that the EXP-301 restructure superseded; closing as already-fixed-by-related is the audit-trail-clean closure path. No patch required. Verified verbatim by analyst-opus 2026-05-15 (clone @ commit 3b6c7df57725).
